LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER KEVIN WILLIAMS NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITIONER'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE TO REVIEW CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 22, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 23, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Review California Department Of Motor Vehicles Administrative Decision
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER KEVIN WILLIAMS' HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE TO REVIEW CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION.

No appearances. This matter is off calendar per dismissal with prejudice filed on September 23, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Review California Department Of Motor Vehicles Administrative Decision
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Continued To Oct-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER KEVIN WILLIAMS Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner's Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Review California Department Of Motor Vehicles Administrative Decision is continued to October 22, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 23, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
